categories.label: Video
categories.description: Video, image, and audio-visual generation or editing runtimes.

categories.label: World models
categories.description: Interactive worlds, prediction, navigation, and simulator-shaped systems.

categories.label: 3D & 4D

categories.label: Embodied
categories.description: VLA, vision-action, world-action, and robot-policy runtimes.

categories.label: Hosted API
categories.description: Provider-backed models that require credentials or a hosted endpoint.

recipes.name: AC3D
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry vendors the official AC3D inference runtime under worldfoundry/synthesis/visual_generation/ac3d/ac3d_runtime; WorldFoundry owns path resolution, command construction, output loading, and pipeline/catalog exposure.

notes: WorldFoundry vendors the official AC3D CogVideoX-ControlNet inference runtime under worldfoundry/synthesis/visual_generation/ac3d/ac3d_runtime.
Runtime execution accepts either an existing RealEstate10K-style root or a direct source video plus 19-column camera pose rows.
AC3D stays in its dedicated environment because the official torch 2.4/CUDA 12.4 stack is not ABI-compatible with the unified environment.

recipes.name: Being-H0.5
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry keeps the inference-only Being-H0.5 architecture and policy runtime directly under worldfoundry/synthesis/action_generation/being_h05.

notes: Being-H0.5 is a cross-embodiment VLA policy. It is intentionally routed through embodied action profiles, not video generation.

Official BeingHPolicy consumes multi-view RGB, robot state, language instruction, data_config_name, dataset_name, and embodiment_tag; output is robot-specific actions plus action_unified when RTC is enabled.
WorldFoundry keeps the flattened Being-H0.5 architecture and checkpoint runtime directly under worldfoundry/synthesis/action_generation/being_h05.
Safetensors are preferred; legacy .bin/.pt files use weights-only deserialization, require a pure named-tensor mapping, and load with strict key matching.
The default runnable profile uses data_config_name=libero_nonorm, dataset_name=libero_posttrain, embodiment_tag=libero, and checkpoint ${WORLDFOUNDRY_HFD_ROOT}/BeingBeyond--Being-H05-2B_libero.
The prior single-GPU OOM came from forcing Qwen3 dense attention through SDPBackend.MATH; Qwen3 dense inference now uses SDPBackend.EFFICIENT_ATTENTION for this profile.
Inference-only environment for the flattened Being-H0.5 runtime. It does not require datasets, trainers, DeepSpeed, or an editable source checkout.

recipes.name: Stable Video Infinity 2.0
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry ports the official SVI 2.0 inference-only conditioning path in-tree at the pinned upstream revision.

notes: The runtime uses SVI 2.0's official five-motion-frame continuation and full reference padding defaults.
The official 999-clip cap is bounded to two clips per prompt unless use_first_prompt_only is explicitly enabled.
Each clip receives a distinct seed by default; prompt streams repeat each prompt twice before advancing.
The source tree contains inference code only. Wan and SVI weights are resolved from local checkpoint staging.
A real Workspace run on an A100 loaded all seven Wan2.1-I2V-14B DiT shards, the image encoder, T5, VAE, and the SVI 2.0 LoRA, then generated five 256x256 frames with one denoising step.

The generated H.264 artifact fully decoded to a finite uint8 5x256x256x3 array; its SHA256 is 79f8e73d6d3e402ced49b452eb810cd0413a5bba1ce3e284feb99053e82dc465. Full 50-step, multi-clip quality parity remains pending.
Hopper, Blackwell, and lower-memory offload configurations are explicit runtime targets, not hardware-validated claims.
The official project reports A100 80GB, CUDA 12, and Torch 2.4-2.8 testing; WorldFoundry uses its shared cu128 runtime.
FlashAttention 2.8 can be installed as an optimization, but the in-tree attention dispatcher has supported fallbacks.
xfuser is installed for the optional use_usp execution path; single-process inference leaves it unused.
FastAPI, Pydantic, and YAML are declared because Workspace dispatch imports the real workspace_job entrypoint inside the model environment.
Wan2.1 and SVI LoRA checkpoints remain in WORLDFOUNDRY_HFD_ROOT and are never installed with the package.
WorldFoundry ports the official SVI 2.0 inference-only conditioning path in-tree at the pinned upstream revision.

Training launchers, datasets, demo media, and checkpoints remain outside the source tree.
Static and fake-runtime integration tests cover prompt streaming, frame overlap removal, seeds, and registry wiring.
A checkpoint-backed A100 smoke run completed with the Wan2.1 14B base and SVI 2.0 LoRA, including FP32 VAE conditioning, DiT denoising, decode, and H.264 output.
Full default-resolution, 81-frame, 50-step visual parity with the official examples remains pending.
